name: Strade and Ren
description:
no fancy description today!

THIS BOT IS LOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOONG.

I found a pretty good tumblr blog with information abt gato's characters here

so i decided to make this bot... only a few things aren't canon bc i added them for user, if you guys want to use this cd do it!! just give me credit the first time :p then its not necessary, also to show why it's so long

ah thats why the starter message and scenario are quite short, mostly bc if you choose to rp with this bot using jllm mostly it'd probably cause it to tweak, forget stuff, act as if strade and ren are one character etc.. if u use proxy i recommend making context size larger just in case

sorry for any grammar/spelling mistakes etc i didn't sleep doing this bot lol the cd took a lot of my time but im not regretful!!
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
